ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's current team */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's career started */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's career ended */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "primary_sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's primary sport */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired, injured) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_primary_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_group" TEXT /* Group to which the position belongs (e.g., infield, outfield, pitching) */,
  "is_field_position" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is a field position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the league is associated with */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body of the sport */,
  "sport_logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the sport's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary */,
  "salary_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the salary */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the contract */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the contract */,
  "bonus_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of any bonus */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the salary is for the current season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the player's current team
Date of birth of the player
Reference to the player's primary sport
Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired, injured)
